programmes.show_description: On Halloween, Mulder and Scully investigate the death of a corporate executive who may have been murdered by an AI computer.
When a team of geophysicists stationed at a remote Alaskan outpost are killed by a parasitic alien life form, Mulder and Scully are called in.
When a space shuttle mission is sabotaged, Mulder suspects an alien spirit may inhabit the body of a former Gemini astronaut.
A group of snowplough drivers and vehicle rescue patrols dedicate themselves, all day every day, to keeping Britain's roads safe when big freezes strike.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Teleshopping.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Award winning eFOLDi lightweight electric folding mobility scooters.
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Documentary series following the crews who keep Britain moving when a big freeze strikes.
A digger has fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over on its side - blocking one side of a busy A road. Recovery op Marta rescues a truck full of bread.
At Crouch HQ, there is excitement in the air as the team help to make trucking superfan Chris's wedding day extra special.
Dirt road veteran Dennis Dent goes head-to-head with a lifelong nemesis. Meanwhile, Christian Reynolds takes on the wild back country on a vital mission to build a bridge.
Turbo is fighting to stay on track and on schedule to complete a marathon trek home. Meanwhile, in Tasmania Euan is hitching a ride to deliver a volatile road.
Steve Graham is racing the rain and joining forces to build a mega road train. Meanwhile, on a cross-country marathon, Yogi's truck hits the wall.
In Townsville, Queensland, long-distance trucker Peter is getting set for a cross-country haul. He has to move a load of mixed freight through bush, farmland and desert to Darwin.
Matt Adams rides a volatile load into a world of trouble with a bull on board. The Kendalls share a family trucking experience and another haul carries a sting...
Upbeat western starring John Wayne and Binnie Barnes. A pharmacist who settles in California during the Gold Rush is forced to confront a bullying local gunman. (1942)

With the last mill shutting down, Craig shifts into overdrive; the late season push hits hard on the crew and the equipment; as breakdowns add up, driver Taylor hits his breaking point.
The LeBeau brothers' fleet battles muddy, sinking roads to get the last logs down the mountain before spring break up sends them all home.

Biggers and Andy track down a suspected drug runner on the M25. Emily and Grant join forces with Ofcom to raid an illegal pirate radio station.
The officers intercept three men armed with a burglary toolkit and apprehend a suspected drug-driver.

Big Andy is tasked with transporting a massive excavator to its new owner in Somerset but winching it onto his trailer won't be easy; the hydraulics are jammed.
Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston. The police have their hands full with the machinations of forgers, fakers and takers.
This episode hits the ground running as the interceptors pull over a driver, who casually steps out of the car, before taking off like a shot.
Cops seek a car on clone plates that has racked up nearly 600 fines. PC Leslie pulls over a driver in a car that's not his, with no insurance and no licence.
Armed police respond to reports of a fight involving machetes. Plus, cops provide a dawn chorus (aka raid).
Jamie isn't the only tow guy on the Coq - lone wolf Al Quiring his main rival. When the Rotator is out of action during a busy week, Al takes the opportunity to scoop a job off Jamie.
We see what happens when a driver dozes off behind the wheel in Tennessee, a truck driver battles high winds in Croatia, and a Texas tornado gives one driver an unforgettable commute. (Ep4)
Mulder suspects supernatural involvement in two identical murders committed at exactly the same time on different coasts.
